fn build_csv(rows: &[Row]) -> String {
    let mut output = String::new();
    for row in rows {
        // BAD: format! in loop for simple string building
        output = format!("{}\n{},{},{},{}", output, row.id, row.name, row.value, row.ts);
    }
    output
}

fn build_log_line(entries: &[LogEntry]) -> String {
    let mut result = String::new();
    for entry in entries {
        // BAD: format! allocates a new string each iteration
        result = format!("{} | {}: {}", result, entry.timestamp, entry.message);
    }
    result
}
